version_description: From 2023. Link to the song: https://youtu.be/aoJwvnDuAR0.

versions.version_description: Included the bass changes that the second guitar plays, they are optional but it sounds amazing when they're included.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
WHERE THE WILD THINGS ARE
As recorded by Luke Combs
(From the 2023 Album GETTIN' OLD)



Capo 1st fret

Alternatively you may tune down 1/2 step
and transpose +2 steps.



[Intro]
[ch]D[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]
My big brother rode an Indian Scout[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]D[/ch]
It was black like his jacket[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]G[/ch]
American Spirit hangin' outta his mouth[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]D[/ch]
Just like our daddy[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Bm[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]
He kicked-started that bike one night and broke Mama's heart[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
He pointed that headlight west[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Out where the wild things are[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab]N.C.                  [ch]G[/ch]
He'd call me up every couple of weeks[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]D[/ch]
From South California[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]G[/ch]
Talk about the desert and the Joshua Tree[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]D[/ch]
And his pretty girl stories[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
How he bought an Airstream trailer and a J-45 guitar[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]G[/ch]
Said, "Little brother, you'd love it out here[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Out where the wild things are"[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
Oh, it's hearts on fire and crazy dreams[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
Oh, the nights ignite like gasoline[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]                     [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
And light up those streets that never sleep when the sky goes dark[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Out where the wild things are[/tab]


[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]
I called my brother from the back of that plane[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]
The second I made it[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]G[/ch]
We started drinkin' on the strip in LA[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]D[/ch]
And then it got crazy[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]
Ended up at a house in the hills with some Hollywood stars[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]G[/ch]
Kissin' on a blonde in a backyard pool[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]Bm[/ch]
Out where the wild things are[/tab]


[Guitar Solo]
[ch]G[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]  [ch]A[/ch]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]A[/ch]
Oh,  yeah[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]
Couple iron horse rebels[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Wild as the devil[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]
I knew I had to move back east[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]G[/ch]
Said goodbye to my brother[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
At the end of that summer[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]A[/ch]
But I knew he'd never leave[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
Oh, it's hearts on fire and crazy dreams[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]A[/ch]
Oh, the nights ignite like gasoline[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]D[/ch]                              [ch]A[/ch]
And oh, them Indian Scouts, man, they're built for speed[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]                      [ch]A[/ch]
And oh, they said he hit that guardrail at half past three[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]Em[/ch]
Lit up those streets that never sleep when the sky goes dark[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]              [ch]A[/ch]
We buried him out in the wind 'neath the West Coast stars[/tab]
[tab]N.C.                      [ch]D[/ch]
Out where the wild things are[/tab]


[Outro]
[ch]D[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                         [ch]D[/ch]
Out where the wild things are[/tab]
